awesome-mcp-servers

200+ MCP servers for every use case: web scraping, database access, file systems, browser automation, design tools, and more.

If you use Claude, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible tool, this is your plugin directory. Updated daily.

gem.problem: Stop guessing why your Node.js app is slow.
gem.one: Zero-config Node.js profiling. One command tells you exactly which function burns CPU.
bullets: Flame graphs generated automatically in your browser

No code changes needed, works on production servers
